hero.name: Christopher Bobrowitz
hero.headline: Enterprise Technology Leadership Across Data, Platforms, and AI
hero.tagline: Lead Platform Architect at Viasat with 10+ years delivering cloud-native systems across airline, automotive, and satellite organizations.
hero.availability: Currently employed at Viasat, open to select contract-based projects.

trustSignals.label: Leadership style
trustSignals.detail: Sets architectural direction while staying close to delivery

trustSignals.label: Execution coverage
trustSignals.detail: From platform strategy to production delivery and team enablement

impact.title: Selected Impact
impact.subtitle: Outcomes delivered across platform architecture, analytics, and machine learning.

highlights.title: Digital Platform Modernization
highlights.description: Led modernization of booking and self-service systems supporting core customer revenue flows.

highlights.title: Data Platform Adoption
highlights.description: Scaled centralized analytics capabilities to self-service teams across Hawaiian Airlines.

highlights.title: AI Platform Delivery
highlights.description: Architecting next-generation AI/ML platform capabilities for content delivery at Viasat.

currentWork.title: What I'm Working On
currentWork.subtitle: Current projects and active development work.

projects.title: AI-Powered Code Review Pipeline
projects.description: Built and deployed an AI agent that automatically reviews pull requests for code quality, security, and standards compliance. Handles incremental diffs, avoids noise, and runs autonomously in a cloud-native deployment pipeline.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Operations Framework
projects.description: Designing a framework where specialized AI agents collaborate on operational tasks, from querying monitoring dashboards to routing conversations in team chat. Built on modern agent-to-agent protocols with multi-turn conversation support.

projects.title: Cloud Infrastructure Automation
projects.description: Managing multi-environment cloud infrastructure using infrastructure-as-code, including service deployments, load balancer consolidation, and cross-environment access controls. Automated from planning through apply across dev, staging, and production.

projects.title: Developer Tooling & CI/CD
projects.description: Building internal developer tools and deployment pipelines that support dual-environment deployments, automated documentation generation, and codebase-wide standardization across multiple repositories.

about.title: About
about.description: Lead Platform Architect at Viasat with 10+ years building enterprise-grade systems at Fortune 500 companies. Specialized in AI/ML platform architecture, cloud-native infrastructure, and technical leadership across automotive, airline, and satellite industries. Currently architecting next-generation AI platforms while staying hands-on with modern technologies.

philosophy.title: Agency is everything
philosophy.content: The work I'm proudest of happened because I just started. Most people would rather discuss than do. Most decisions are reversible and you're rewarded for moving first.

philosophy.title: Ship or die
philosophy.content: Speed wins. Fast iteration beats perfect planning. The barriers to shipping are usually imaginary.

philosophy.title: Being human matters more than ever
philosophy.content: AI commoditizes execution while human creativity becomes scarce. We're wired to value what other humans make. Authenticity compounds exponentially. Most people won't put themselves out there, so they never capture the value they create.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Available for high-impact consulting and architecture discussions.
contact.availability: Open to select side projects aligned with platform engineering and AI/ML.
